context: Tests whether BrowserEngineKit stale API snippets are corrected against the current Swift overlay and Apple docs.

checklist.name: Extension protocol conformance
checklist.description: Corrects WebContentExtension to a protocol conformance with handle(xpcConnection:) and no override.

checklist.name: Minimal bookmark
checklist.description: Uses a minimal bookmark from the host app and resolves it with .withoutUI in the extension.

checklist.name: Stop file access
checklist.description: Calls stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource after resolving and using the bookmark.

checklist.name: Memory entitlement values
checklist.description: States that memory transfer_send and transfer_accept entitlement values are the host browser app bundle identifier rather than true.

checklist.name: CoreML availability
checklist.description: Guards RenderingExtensionFeature.coreML / enableFeature(.coreML) with iOS 26.2+ availability.
